supercharged_vision.tagline: A hyper-local, explainable, offline-capable AI Digital Twin for every farm
core_capabilities: Yield and profit forecasting with seasonal adjustments
Parametric insurance triggers with satellite verification
Verifiable via satellite + IoT + blockchain integration

components.live_predictions: Real-time crop health and yield forecasting

explainable_recommender.description: SHAP + Counterfactual explanations for actionable insights

features.recommendation_format: Switch to maize would increase expected yield by 18%
features.reasoning: Because rainfall forecast + pH + seed variety X match optimal conditions

carbon_credits_pipeline.description: Verifiable carbon sequestration measurement and trading

process.trading: Automated credit minting and marketplace integration

market_integration.description: Dynamic crop planning with buyer connections

analysis.attribution: Causal link between practices and outcomes

privacy_features.local_data: Farmer data never leaves the device
privacy_features.ownership: Farmers control and monetize their data

data_sources.satellite: SoilGrids, Bhuvan, Sentinel-2 via Earth Engine
data_sources.farmer_input: Photos, historical crop data, IoT sensors

infrastructure.production: GCP: Earth Engine, Vertex AI, Cloud Functions, Firebase

must_have_day_1: Digital Twin Builder - GPS + soil input + photo analysis
Top 3 crop recommendations with confidence scores
stretch_day_2: Satellite anomaly detection + mock insurance payout
Mock buyer matching and settlement preview

execution_timeline.hours_0_1: Setup repositories, install libraries (xgboost, shap, gradio)
execution_timeline.hours_1_3: Build dataset (government soil + synthetic) + ETL pipeline
execution_timeline.hours_3_5: Train XGBoost + implement SHAP wrapper + counterfactual functions
execution_timeline.hours_5_7: Build Gradio UI with input forms, prediction tables, NDVI visualization
execution_timeline.hours_7_8: Add multilingual LLM integration for explanation conversion
execution_timeline.hours_8_10: Polish, package, prepare demo script and presentation

novel_claims: Counterfactual + SHAP bilingual explanation pipeline for farmer-friendly actionables
Parametric payout orchestration with composite satellite NDVI + soil + market triggers
Field Digital Twin compression method for <10MB on-device models
Multilingual voice-first explainable AI for agricultural decision making

impact_metrics.coverage: Offline inference capability for remote areas
impact_metrics.impact: 15-25% yield increase, 20-40% income uplift, 30% chemical reduction
